The '''Arbran system''', or '''Arbra system''', was a six-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] located within the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was home to the planet of [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]].

{{System-stub}}
